has_github_actions.name: geoviews
has_github_actions.summary: GeoViews is a Python library that makes it easy to explore and visualize geographical, meteorological, and oceanographic datasets, such as those used in weather, climate, and remote sensing research.

has_github_actions.name: enterprise-integrated-channels
has_github_actions.summary: An integrated channel is an abstraction meant to represent a third-party system                 which provides an API that can be used to transmit EdX data to the third-party system.
has_github_actions.author: Open edX Project

has_github_actions.name: django-filer
has_github_actions.summary: A file management application for django that makes handling of files and images a breeze.

has_github_actions.name: copasi-basico
has_github_actions.summary: Simplified COPASI interface for python
has_github_actions.author: COPASI Team

has_github_actions.author: Andrew Beveridge

has_github_actions.summary: Tool for live presentations using manim

has_github_actions.name: agent-cli

has_github_actions.author: Jacob Darker
